name: Azure IAM Over Privileged RBAC Administrator Role Assigned To A User
description: This model detects successful assignment of over-privileged Azure IAM RBAC Administrator role to a user which may indicate an attacker trying to escalate privileges to manage access policies and roles across resources to further compromise the Azure environment.

rules.name: Azure IAM Over Privileged RBAC Administrator Role Assigned To A User

author: Yash Verma and Srivathsa H S
